events.title: Kenyan Highland Hiking
events.description: Reconnect with nature in the breathtaking Kenyan highlights. Experience community and rejuvination with your fellow Gen-x and Mellenial friends.

events.title: Hell's Gate Rock Climbing
events.description: Push your limits with professional rock climbing for women at Hell's Gate. Find your inner strength and bond with a powerful community.

events.title: Serene Garden Prayer Session
events.description: A peaceful gathering for spiritual nourishment and shared gratitude in our lush, private Kenyan gardens.
